verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My hope is You Show me Your ways Guide me in truth In all my days My hope is You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To You oh Lord I lift my soul In You oh God I place my trust And do not let me be put to shame Don't let my enemies Triumph over me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am oh Lord filled with Your love You are oh God my salvation Well guard my life and rescue me My broken spirit shouts My mended heart cries out
